channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Psilocybin may cause lasting brain changes after trip ends
item.description: A single psilocybin dose led to measurable brain activity and structural changes lasting up to a month.

item.title: Ancient DNA reveals secrets of China's 4,000-year-old Shimao city
item.description: Ancient DNA from the Shimao settlement is revealing how one of East Asia's earliest complex societies was organized.

item.title: China's Chang'e-6 reveals why solar wind affects the Moon's two sides differently
item.description: Chang'e-6 samples show a surprising difference in how solar wind particles penetrate the Moon's hemispheres.

item.title: A hidden 'switch-off' signal could predict solar storms seven years early
item.description: A new turning point in the Sun's 11-year cycle may allow scientists to forecast solar activity years earlier.
